tuning: E A D G B E

recommended.song_name: Good Riddance Time Of Your Life

content:
This is a super-easy, pared down version. I find the original Hootie version to be too 
to do acoustically and without a lead guitar. It's also a different key than the 
It suits my female voice much better.

Let Her Cry
